/usr/bin/c++  -mmacosx-version-min=14.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/DeviceLink.dir/DeviceLink_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeviceLink.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o DeviceLink -F/usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib -F/usr/local/Cellar/qtserialport/6.10.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/qtserialport/6.10.2/lib libDeviceLinkCore.a /usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /usr/local/Cellar/qtserialport/6.10.2/lib/QtSerialPort.framework/Versions/A/QtSerialPort /usr/local/Cellar/qtbase/6.10.2/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
